description: Track folder for system-spec-kit packets — the framework's own internals: Spec Kit Memory MCP server (memory engine + spec-doc indexing), code graph, skill graph + advisor, hooks/plugin runtime parity, and graph-and-context-optimization work. Active phase 026 covers graph and context optimization across runtime executor hardening, code graph, skill advisor, hook parity, and template levels. Historical phases live under z_archive (memory architecture, hybrid RAG fusion, compact code graph, etc.).
